testsuite.name: Scenario: cucumbers from multiple snacks add up

testcase.name: Given I have eaten 5 cukes
testcase.classname: Scenario: cucumbers from multiple snacks add up

testcase.name: Given I have eaten 6 cukes
testcase.classname: Scenario: cucumbers from multiple snacks add up

testcase.name: When I wait 2 hour
testcase.classname: Scenario: cucumbers from multiple snacks add up

testcase.name: Then my belly should growl
testcase.classname: Scenario: cucumbers from multiple snacks add up

testcase.name: classMethod
testcase.classname: Scenario: cucumbers from multiple snacks add up

testsuite.system-out: I'm eating 5 cukes! I ate 5 cucumbers.
